metadata.title: CodeContextBench Selected Benchmark Tasks (SDLC Suite Reorganization)
metadata.migration_source: migration_map.json (157 mapped tasks across 8 SDLC suites)
metadata.target_note: 150 SDLC tasks (9 suites, Neyman-optimal) + 220 MCP-unique tasks (11 suites, Neyman-optimal) = 370 active.
metadata.note: DOE-driven rebalance: 150 SDLC (Neyman-optimal) + 220 MCP-unique (Neyman-optimal). MCP-unique rebalance: 13 scaffolded (IDs 272-284), 7 promoted from onboarding_extra, 20 low-IV tasks moved to benchmarks/backups/*_doe_trim/.

methodology.description: Tasks reorganized from 17 legacy suites into 9 SDLC-phase suites (ccb_build split into ccb_feature + ccb_refactor). Each task retains its original scoring and metadata; only the suite assignment and task_dir are updated to reflect the new SDLC taxonomy. Tasks with status 'archived' or 'retired' in migration_map.json are excluded.

suite_descriptions.ccb_understand: Codebase comprehension, Q&A, onboarding, knowledge discovery
suite_descriptions.ccb_design: Architecture analysis, dependency mapping, cross-repo reasoning
suite_descriptions.ccb_fix: Bug fixes, SWE-bench Pro patches, multi-team ownership fixes
suite_descriptions.ccb_test: Code review, test writing, performance testing, search tasks
suite_descriptions.ccb_document: Documentation generation (API, architecture, migration, K8s packages)
suite_descriptions.ccb_secure: Security vulnerability triage, governance compliance, access control
suite_descriptions.ccb_debug: Investigation, debugging, fault localization, regression hunting
suite_descriptions.ccb_feature: Feature implementation, interface implementation, big-code features
suite_descriptions.ccb_refactor: Cross-file refactoring, enterprise dependency refactoring, rename refactoring

difficulty_formula.description: Difficulty is computed from size proxies (context/files), complexity proxies (cross-file + semantic + category), and ground-truth knowledge depth (reward_type + GT artifact richness).
